query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS state_licensing_authorities (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  state VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  authority_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  authority_code VARCHAR(20),
  website_url VARCHAR(500),
  api_endpoint VARCHAR(500),
  supported_trades VARCHAR(500),
  license_format VARCHAR(100),
  verification_method ENUM('api', 'web_scrape', 'manual', 'not_available') DEFAULT 'manual',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
